rationale: The cited paper is used for more than background listing. In the conceptual development, the citing paper references Stremersch et al. (2003) when defining and motivating the customer knowledge construct in technology-intensive buying contexts. Most importantly, in the method section it explicitly states that the buyer know-how measure is adapted from Stremersch et al. (2003), which is a direct measurement borrowing that supports hypothesis testing.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the cited paper's prior work on buyer know-how by using it to ground the customer knowledge construct and by adapting its measurement scale. This borrowed construct operationalization is then used in the citing paper's model of vendor customization control.
